name: Simple Brisket
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds fresh beef brisket (up to 5 lbs)
1 1.5 oz packet dry onion soup mix
recipeInstructions:
Serves 8 to 10
Trim all excess fat from the brisket. Combine the onion soup mix with mushrooms and their liquid.
Place the brisket in a Crock-Pot with the fat side up, cutting it if necessary to fit.
Spread the onion soup mixture over the top of the brisket, moistening well.
Cover and cook on Low for 10 to 14 hours.
Remove the brisket and cut across the grain into thin slices. Serve with the meat juices poured over the slices.
